criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance music creation, recommendation, or personalization.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall quality of the user interface and ease of use.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, user reviews.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and market presence.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, app store rankings.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and novelty of the app's approach to AI in music.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, industry reviews.
